testcase.name: [BeforeSuite]
[It] SSHCertificateAuthority When managing SSH certificate authorities Given a valid Ed25519 public key should create an SSH certificate authority with correct response fields
[It] SSHCertificateAuthority When managing SSH certificate authorities Given a valid Ed25519 public key should appear in the list filtered by org and project
[It] SSHCertificateAuthority When managing SSH certificate authorities Given a valid Ed25519 public key should delete the SSH certificate authority and confirm it is no longer found
[It] SSHCertificateAuthority When getting a non-existent SSH certificate authority Given a non-existent SSH certificate authority ID should return not found
[It] SSHCertificateAuthority When creating an SSH certificate authority with an invalid key Given a malformed public key should return 422 Unprocessable Entity
[It] Flavor Discovery When listing flavors for a region Given valid region and organization should return all available flavors
[It] Flavor Discovery When listing flavors for a region Given invalid parameters should reject requests with invalid region ID for flavors
[It] Image Discovery When listing images for a region Given valid region and organization should return all available images
[It] Image Discovery When listing images for a region Given invalid parameters should reject requests with invalid region ID for images
[It] LoadBalancer When managing load balancer lifecycle Given a backend member and publicIP=true creates a load balancer in Pending state
[It] LoadBalancer When managing load balancer lifecycle Given a backend member and publicIP=true appears in the load balancer list
[It] LoadBalancer When managing load balancer lifecycle Given a backend member and publicIP=true can be retrieved by id
[It] LoadBalancer When managing load balancer lifecycle Given a backend member and publicIP=true eventually reports Provisioned with status.vipAddress and status.publicIP populated
[It] LoadBalancer When managing load balancer lifecycle Given a backend member and publicIP=true accepts updates to allowed CIDRs and pool members
[It] LoadBalancer When managing load balancer lifecycle Given a backend member and publicIP=true eventually clears status.publicIP when publicIP is toggled to false
[It] LoadBalancer When managing load balancer lifecycle Given a backend member and publicIP=true deletes the load balancer and confirms it disappears

[It] LoadBalancer When creating a UDP listener without idleTimeoutSeconds Given a UDP listener on port 53 with idleTimeoutSeconds omitted creates the load balancer and persists idleTimeoutSeconds as nil
[It] LoadBalancer When delete is invoked repeatedly during cleanup Given a provisioned load balancer creates and reaches Provisioned
[It] LoadBalancer When delete is invoked repeatedly during cleanup Given a provisioned load balancer acknowledges the first delete
[It] LoadBalancer When delete is invoked repeatedly during cleanup Given a provisioned load balancer treats an immediate second delete as idempotent
[It] LoadBalancer When delete is invoked repeatedly during cleanup Given a provisioned load balancer treats subsequent retries as idempotent until the load balancer is gone
[It] Region ACL Enforcement When the owning organization supplies a private region ID Given a flavor list request should return available flavors
[It] Region ACL Enforcement When the owning organization supplies a private region ID Given an image list request should succeed
[It] Region ACL Enforcement When a non-owning organization supplies a private region ID directly Given a flavor list request for the private region should return 404 without leaking region existence
[It] Region ACL Enforcement When a non-owning organization supplies a private region ID directly Given an image list request for the private region should return 404 without leaking region existence

[It] Region ACL Enforcement When a non-owning organization supplies a private region ID directly Given a network creation request referencing the private region should return 404 without leaking region existence
[It] Network Management When managing the network lifecycle Given valid organization and project credentials should provision a network with correct metadata and prefix
[It] Network Management When managing the network lifecycle Given an existing network should appear in the project network list
[It] Network Management When managing the network lifecycle Given an existing network should reach provisioned state and be retrievable by ID
[It] Network Management When managing the network lifecycle Given an existing network should reflect updated name and description while preserving the prefix
[It] Network Management When managing the network lifecycle Given the network is deleted should succeed
[It] Network Management When managing the network lifecycle Given the network is deleted should return 404 on subsequent reads
[It] External Network Discovery When listing external networks for a region Given valid region and organization should return 403 when RBAC denies access to external networks
[It] External Network Discovery When listing external networks for a region Given invalid parameters should reject requests with invalid region ID for external networks
[It] Image Management When listing images Given invalid parameters should return an error for an invalid organization ID
[It] Image Management When listing images Given invalid parameters should return an error for an invalid region ID
[It] Image Management When listing images Given a valid organization and region should return a non-empty list of images
[It] Image Management When deleting an image Given an image ID that does not exist in the cache should return not found
[It] Image Management When managing a custom image should create a custom image and return its ID
[It] Image Management When managing a custom image should become ready and visible in the image list
[It] Image Management When managing a custom image should delete the custom image successfully
[It] Image Management When managing a custom image should return not found when deleting the already-deleted image
[It] File Storage Management When listing file storage resources Given valid project access should return file storage resources for the project

testcase.name: [It] Region Discovery When listing regions Given valid organization access should return all available regions
[It] Region Discovery When listing regions Given invalid parameters should reject requests with empty organization ID
[It] Region Discovery When listing regions Given invalid parameters should reject requests with invalid organization ID format
[It] Region Discovery When listing regions Given the region is private to the requesting organization should be visible to the owning organization
[It] Region Discovery When listing regions Given the region is private to a different organization should not be visible to other organizations
[It] SecurityGroup When managing security groups Given a network fixture and valid configuration should create a security group with correct response fields
[It] SecurityGroup When managing security groups Given a network fixture and valid configuration should appear in the list filtered by org, project and region
[It] SecurityGroup When managing security groups Given a network fixture and valid configuration should update rules and verify the change persists on re-GET
[It] SecurityGroup When managing security groups Given a network fixture and valid configuration should delete the security group and confirm it is no longer found
[It] SecurityGroup When getting a non-existent security group Given a non-existent security group ID should return not found
